_comment: BRAND CONFIGURATION FILE - Edit this file to customize your landing pages
_instructions: Only edit the VALUES (text inside quotes). DO NOT change the property names (text before the colon).

brand._instructions: Fill in your brand details below. This appears on all pages.
brand.name: Your Brand Name
brand._name_help: 👆 Type your company name here (example: Killer Whale Ventures)
brand._code_help: 👆 Create a 2-4 letter code for yoFur brand (lowercase, no spaces). Examples: kwv, nike, aapl. This is used in image filenames.
brand._gtmId_help: 👆 Your Google Tag Manager container ID. Get this from: tagmanager.google.com > Admin > Container Settings
brand._gtmId_critical: 🚨 CRITICAL: This MUST be changed from GTM-XXXXXXX to your actual container ID. Without this, NO TRACKING will work! All conversion tracking, retargeting pixels, and postbacks require GTM to be configured correctly.
brand._gtmId_where_to_get: Get your GTM ID: 1) Go to tagmanager.google.com, 2) Click Admin (bottom left), 3) Click Container Settings, 4) Copy the Container ID (starts with GTM-)
brand._logo_help: 👆 Your logo filename in the /public/ folder
brand.copyright: © 2026 Your Brand Name. All rights reserved.
brand._copyright_help: 👆 Copyright text shown in footer. Update the year and company name.

landing_page._instructions: Customize your landing page headline, button text, and background image.

defaults.headline: Transform Your Business Today
defaults._headline_help: 👆 Main headline on your landing page. Make it compelling! (40-60 characters works best)
defaults.subheadline: Join thousands of successful companies already using our proven system
defaults._subheadline_help: 👆 Subheadline below main headline. Explain your value proposition. (60-120 characters)
defaults._cta_text_help: 👆 Text on your main button. Keep it short and action-oriented. Examples: 'Get Started Now', 'Book Demo', 'View Live Signals'
defaults._cta_link_help: 👆 Where the button takes users. Usually a Calendly link, TypeBot survey, or FormBricks form. MUST start with https://
defaults._background_image_help: 👆 Background image filename. Use format: NUMBER_BRANDCODE.jpg (example: 5_kwv.jpg). Image must be in /public/ folder.
defaults._mobile_image_required: 📱 IMPORTANT: You MUST also create a mobile version named NUMBER_BRANDCODE_mobile.jpg (example: 5_kwv_mobile.jpg)
defaults._overlay_help: 👆 How dark the background overlay is. Options: light, medium, dark, xdark

styling._headline_size_help: 👆 Headline font size. Default is 3rem. Bigger = 4rem, Smaller = 2.5rem
styling._button_color_help: 👆 Button background color (hex code). Popular colors: Blue=#2563eb, Green=#10b981, Purple=#7c3aed, Red=#ef4444, Teal=#1DBF8A
styling._button_text_color_help: 👆 Button text color (hex code). Usually white (#ffffff) or black (#000000)
styling._button_size_help: 👆 Button size. Options: small, medium, large, xlarge
styling._button_style_help: 👆 Button corner style. Options: square (no rounding), rounded (12px), pill (fully rounded), subtle (8px)

features._note: Additional features like countdown timer and progress indicators can be enabled via URL parameters on the landing page (not in this config file).

social_proof._enabled_help: 👆 Show social proof popups? true = yes, false = no
social_proof._default_text_help: 👆 Text shown in social proof popup. Update the number to match your actual customers.

scarcity._enabled_help: 👆 Show 'only X spots remaining' message? true = yes, false = no
scarcity._default_text_help: 👆 Scarcity message. {spots} will be replaced with the number above.

micro_yes._enabled_help: 👆 Show 'Yes, I'm interested' checkbox that must be checked before CTA is enabled? Good for lead qualification. true = yes, false = no
micro_yes._default_text_help: 👆 Checkbox label text. Examples: 'Yes, I want to learn more', 'I'm ready to get started'
micro_yes._note: Can also be enabled per-landing-page via URL parameter: ?micro_yes=on&micro_text=Custom+text

thank_you_page._instructions: Customize what users see after they convert. This page tracks the final conversion event (thankyou_conversion) in GTM.
thank_you_page._gtm_event: When users reach this page, GTM fires 'thankyou_conversion' event which triggers final conversion pixels and postbacks.
thank_you_page.headline: Thank You!
thank_you_page.message: Check your email for next steps

redirect._enabled_help: 👆 Auto-redirect after thank you page? true = yes, false = no
redirect._delay_help: 👆 How many seconds to wait before redirecting

footer._instructions: Add links to your privacy policy, terms, etc. Set enabled to false to hide a link.

privacy._url_help: 👆 URL to your privacy policy page

conversion_tracker._instructions: Test multiple survey/form URLs to see which converts better.

splitTest._enabled_help: 👆 Enable split testing? true = yes, false = no

variants.name: control
variants._url_help: 👆 Where users go after clicking CTA. Usually Calendly, TypeBot, or FormBricks.
variants._weight_help: 👆 Traffic percentage. 100 = all traffic. For 50/50 split, use 50 here and 50 in variant below.
variants._enabled_help: 👆 Is this variant active? true = yes, false = no

splitTest._add_variant_instructions: To add a second variant for A/B testing, copy the entire {...} block above (including all the curly braces) and paste it below the first variant with a comma separating them. Then change: id to 'variant_a', name to something descriptive like 'TypeBot Survey', url to your second option, and weight to 50 (so both get 50% traffic). Make sure the two weight values add up to 100.

webhooks._status: ⚠️ PLACEHOLDER FOR FUTURE INTEGRATIONS - Not currently implemented
webhooks._instructions: These settings are placeholders for future AI call, SMS, and email integrations. Leave disabled for now.
webhooks._enabled_help: 👆 Enable webhooks? true = yes, false = no. Leave false - not yet implemented.

ai_call._url_help: 👆 Future: Your AI call webhook URL
ai_call._min_eps_help: 👆 Future: Only trigger for leads with quality score ≥ this number (1-100). 70+ = high quality.

email._min_eps_help: 👆 Future: Low quality threshold (still worth emailing)

timing._comment: Timing settings - usually don't need to change
timing._redirectDelay_help: 👆 Milliseconds to wait before redirecting (3000 = 3 seconds)

tracking._gtm_note: 🚨 IMPORTANT: All conversion tracking, retargeting pixels, and postbacks are managed in Google Tag Manager (GTM), NOT in this config file. The GTM container ID above is all you need to configure here.
tracking._postback_note: All AdKernel postbacks, retargeting pixels, and conversion events are fired via GTM triggers and tags. Do not add postback URLs here - add them in your GTM container.

cookies._domain_help: 👆 Cookie domain. Leave as 'auto' - it will detect automatically.
cookies._expirationDays_help: 👆 How long to track users (in days). 365 = 1 year. DO NOT CHANGE unless required by law.
